name: HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS_
description: This table stores the participants that are taking part Performance Document review.

columns.Name: EVAL_PARTICIPANT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of the Participant

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: EVALUATION_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of Evaluation.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: The global ID of the person who is nominated as the participant

columns.Name: EVAL_ROLE_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the role type of the participant

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the questionnaire for the participant

columns.Name: ROLE_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates the code to identify the type of role (MANAGER, WORKER or PARTICIPANT)

columns.Name: PARTICIPATION_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the status of the participant.

columns.Name: STATUS_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date when the participant status was last updated.

columns.Name: DUE_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the due date for the participant to provide the feedback

columns.Name: ADDED_BY_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the person_id who added the participant into the document

columns.Name: ADDED_BY_ROLE
columns.Comments: Stores the role type code of who added the participant into the document

columns.Name: NOTIFIED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the participant was notified.

columns.Name: NOTIFIED_BY_ROLE
columns.Comments: Stores which role sent the request notification to the participant.

columns.Name: NOTIFIED_BY_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the person_id who send request

columns.Name: FDBACK_STARTED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores if the participant has started giving the feedback.

columns.Name: FDBACK_SENT_BACK_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the participant feedback was sent back by the manager for rework.

columns.Name: LOCKED_OUT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the participant is locked out or not.

columns.Name: LOCKED_OUT_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date on which the participant was locked out.

columns.Name: FDBACK_COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores when the participant feedback was completed.

columns.Name: PCPN_COMMENTS_FOR_WRK
columns.Comments: Stores the comments given by the participant that the worker can see.

columns.Name: MATRIX_PARTICIPANT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates that role is matrix participant role.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: PCPN_COMMENT_TEXT_FOR_WRK
columns.Comments: Stores the comments given by the participant that the worker can see.

columns.Name: ACTION_CODE
columns.Comments: Action Code for performing the action on the participant.

columns.Name: ACTION_REASON
columns.Comments: Reason for performing the action on the participant.

columns.Name: ACTION_PERFORMED_BY
columns.Comments: Stores the Person Id of the person performing the action.

columns.Name: ACTION_PERFORMED_DATE
columns.Comments: Timestamp when the action was performed.

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.
